title: 2048 Frost Edition
description: Slide matching ice tiles together to reach the legendary 2048 tile! Smooth, addictive puzzle action with cold frost aesthetics.
controls: Use Arrow Keys or WASD to slide tiles
Combine identical numbers to double them
Press R to restart game
author: Gabriele Cirulli

title: Slope 3D
description: Drive a ball down a steep neon 3D obstacle course at breakneck speeds. Dodge red blocks, jump ramps, and set new high scores!
controls: A / D or Left / Right Arrows to steer
Keep ball on track and avoid obstacles
Collect boosters on the slope
author: Y8 Games

title: Flappy Frost Bird
description: Guide the frosty bird through dangerous icy pipe gaps. Simple one-button controls, high difficulty, endless fun!
controls: Tap Space or Click Mouse to flap wings
Pass through green pipe gaps
Don't crash into the ground or pipes
author: Dong Nguyen

title: Icy Snake Classic
description: Eat frosty apples, grow longer, and don't hit your own tail or the ice walls. Classic retro gameplay reinvented.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to navigate
Eat glowing ice apples to gain points
Avoid crashing into snake body
author: Retro Arcade

title: Tetris Ice Blocks
description: Clear full horizontal lines by rotating falling polyomino ice blocks. Fast-paced spatial puzzle action.
controls: Left / Right Arrows to move block
Up Arrow to rotate piece
Down Arrow to drop faster
Spacebar to hard drop
author: Alexey Pajitnov

title: Cookie Clicker Unblocked
description: Click the giant cookie to bake cookies! Upgrade grandmas, factories, and cosmic portals to produce billions of cookies per second.
controls: Left Click on Big Cookie to earn cookies
Buy auto-clickers & multipliers on right panel
Unlock golden cookie achievements
author: Orteil

title: Pac-Man Arcade
description: Navigate the maze, eat all yellow dots, and avoid Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde! Grab power pellets to eat ghosts.
controls: Arrow Keys to steer Pac-Man
Eat Power Pellets to turn ghosts blue
Clear entire maze to advance
author: Bandai Namco

title: Paper.io 2
description: Conquer as much territory as possible! Draw loops around empty areas or rival territory, but don't let anyone bite your tail.
controls: Mouse pointer or WASD to guide block
Form enclosed loops to capture space
Guard your line while outside your territory
author: Voodoo

title: Space Invaders Frost
description: Defend Earth from invading alien armadas! Move your laser cannon behind bunker shields and blast all incoming invaders.
controls: Left / Right Arrow Keys to slide cannon
Spacebar to shoot laser missile
Hide behind green bunker blocks
author: Taito

title: Drift Boss
description: Drift through tricky zigzag roads with endless twists and sharp turns! Timing is everything to avoid falling into the void.
controls: Click or Spacebar to turn Right
Release to go Left
Time your drift on narrow icy bridges
author: MarketJS

title: Geometry Dash Lite
description: Jump, fly, and flip your way through dangerous spiky obstacles synced to rhythm-heavy electronic soundtracks!
controls: Click or Spacebar / Up Arrow to jump
Hold down to keep jumping
Dodge triangles, spikes, and portals
author: RobTop Games

title: Moto X3M Bike Race
description: Stunt motorcycle racing game with 25+ challenging levels! Perform backflips, dodge dynamite, and beat the clock.
controls: Up Arrow to accelerate
Down Arrow to brake
Left / Right Arrows to lean bike
Spacebar to restart level
author: Madpuffers
